detaileddescription.para: Broadcast when a ToolCallNode detects a tool call with notify_client enabled.

memberdef.argsstring: (EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category="Tryll|Connection", meta=(ToolTip="Host name or IP address of the Tryll server (default: 127.0.0.1).")) FString ServerHost
memberdef.name: UPROPERTY

param.defval: (ToolTip="Host name or IP address of the Tryll server (default: 127.0.0.1).")

detaileddescription.para: Host name or IP address of the Tryll server. Defaults to localhost.

memberdef.argsstring: (EditAnywhere, BlueprintReadWrite, Category="Tryll|Connection", meta=(ToolTip="TCP port the Tryll server is listening on (default: 9100).", ClampMin="1", ClampMax="65535")) int32 ServerPort
memberdef.name: UPROPERTY

param.defval: (ToolTip="TCP port the Tryll server is listening on (default: 9100).", ClampMin="1", ClampMax="65535")

detaileddescription.para: TCP port the Tryll server is listening on (default: 9100).
Open a TCP session to ServerHost:ServerPort. Asynchronous — completion is reported via OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=true). Errors fire OnError. Calling Connect() while already connected is a no-op.
Close the active session. OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=false) fires once the socket is down.
True while the background connection is in the Connected state.
Server-assigned session id, or 0 when not connected.
Send ConfigureSessionRequest. Must be called after Connected and before CreateAgent. Result is delivered via OnConfigureSessionComplete delegate.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FTryllGraphDescription &Graph, TFunction< FTryllOnAgentCreated > OnComplete, bool bEnableDiagnostics=false)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateAgent

detaileddescription.para:
Begin create-agent; completion is delivered via OnComplete on the game thread.
Graph
Workflow graph description to send to the server.
bEnableDiagnostics
When true the server populates TurnComplete.debug_info.
Queue destroy for the given agent.
List models available for the session's inference engine.
Start downloading a model. Progress is broadcast via OnDownloadProgress; completion via OnDownloadComplete.
Pin a model into memory on the server (LoadAndPin). Completion is broadcast via OnLoadModelComplete.
Demote a pinned model to on-demand and evict it if no contexts hold it. Completion is broadcast via OnUnloadModelComplete.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const TArray< FString > &Strings, TFunction< FTryllOnStringStorage > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateStringStorage

detaileddescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from an inline string array. Completion is broadcast via OnCreateStringStorageComplete.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const FString &FilePath, TFunction< FTryllOnStringStorage > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateStringStorageFromFile

detaileddescription.para: Create a named StringStorage on the server from a server-side file path. Completion is broadcast via OnCreateStringStorageComplete.
Destroy a named StringStorage on the server. Nodes that already hold the storage are unaffected.

memberdef.argsstring: (FOnTryllCreateEmbeddedStringStorage, const FString &, Name, int32, RecordCount, bool, bSuccess)
memberdef.name: DECLARE_DYNAMIC_MULTICAST_DELEGATE_ThreeParams

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const FString &ConfigPath, const FString &EmbeddingModel=FString{}, TFunction< FTryllOnEmbeddedStorageCreated > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateEmbeddedStringStorage

detaileddescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from a server-side *.fig.json. Path A: config file + optional embeddingModel override.

memberdef.argsstring: (const FString &Name, const TArray< FString > &Strings, const FString &EmbeddingModel, TFunction< FTryllOnEmbeddedStorageCreated > OnComplete=nullptr)
memberdef.name: RequestCreateEmbeddedStringStorageFromStrings

detaileddescription.para: Create an EmbeddedStringStorage from inline strings. Path B: requires EmbeddingModel.
Destroy a named EmbeddedStringStorage on the server. Nodes that already hold the storage are unaffected.

Game-instance subsystem: one TCP session to the Tryll server. Manages the socket connection on a background thread (FTryllConnection) and drains the event queue on Tick(), dispatching to registered agents and delegates.

Lifecycle (game-thread, event-driven):
Connect() — open TCP session to ServerHost:ServerPort.
OnConnectionChanged(bConnected=true) — bind this to continue; or poll IsConnected().
ConfigureSession(Engine) — select the inference engine for this session. Completion arrives on OnConfigureSessionComplete.
CreateAgent — either attach a UTryllAgentComponent (which calls RequestCreateAgent under the hood when bAutoCreateOnConnect is true) or invoke RequestCreateAgent() directly with a graph. On success the callback gets a TSharedPtr<FTryllAgent>.
SendMessage(Text) — drive one turn through the agent. Streaming chunks arrive on OnAnswerText; the turn ends with OnTurnComplete(Status).
RequestDestroyAgent / Disconnect — tear down when done.
All delegates fire on the game thread from Tick(); it is safe to touch UObjects and UI directly from callbacks.
Usage: UTryllSubsystem* Tryll = GetGameInstance()->GetSubsystem<UTryllSubsystem>(); Tryll->Connect(); // Bind OnConnectionChanged to ConfigureSession, then CreateAgent, then SendMessage.
